Thanks for contributing! Please keep PRs focused and read CONTRIBUTING.md.
Do NOT submit security fixes as public PRs — see SECURITY.md.

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title and commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, …)
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is clean
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./... -race` passes
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies (or justified in the description)
- [ ] Security impact considered (auth, token handling, header forwarding, least privilege)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior or configuration changed
- [ ] I agree to the contribution terms in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (Apache-2.0 + relicensing grant)
